title: How to Integrate Speakatoo's API with a Front-End Application?
excerpt: I’m developing a front-end application and need to integrate Speakatoo’s API. Could someone guide me through the integration process? Any tips, best practices, or code examples would be highly appreciated.

posts.author: jhon001 (Jhon Wick)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m developing a front-end application and need to integrate Speakatoo’s API. Could someone guide me through the integration process? Any tips, best practices, or code examples would be highly appreciated.

posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jhon001 , welcome to the community!
There are few resources I’d recommend to start with:

  1. Our documentation is packed with relevant topics. there’s also the quickstart guide here (it has a quickstart integration app inside)
  2. Our Youtube channel have a few tutorials. also, @ethanolle1 made a nice live video that you can watch as well
  3. Our Kitchen-sink app that contains a few ready-made apps by @dipro

BUT - I think it will be important as well to go thorught Speakatoo’s API documentation before to understand what are their capabilities and limits.
Hopefully more community members here can help,

Good luck,
Omer
